message:
fix: add authorization checks to notification and GPU reservation endpoints, fix tooltip detachment (#5420)

Notification endpoints (#5410, #5413):
- Add admin role check to POST /api/notifications/test and POST /api/notifications/send
- Prevents non-admin users from triggering outbound connections to Slack/SMTP/PagerDuty/OpsGenie

GPU reservation endpoints (#5414, #5415, #5416, #5417):
- ListReservations: non-admin users now only see their own reservations
- GetReservation: ownership or admin check before returning data
- UpdateReservation: ownership or admin check before allowing modifications
- DeleteReservation: ownership or admin check before allowing deletion
- GetReservationUtilization/GetBulkUtilizations: same ownership checks

Tour tooltip (#5411):
- Add scroll event listener (capture phase) alongside existing resize listener
- Tooltip now recalculates position on scroll, staying anchored to target element

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
